name: 2026.13.1 (Plus 1)
body:
## SourceGit Plus v2026.13

Fork of SourceGit with extra features and UX improvements.

### Plus-specific features
* **Drag-and-Drop Local Changes** — drag files/folders between UNSTAGED and STAGED panels to stage/unstage. Multi-drag supported.
* **Ahead/Behind counters** on the Pull/Push buttons.
* **Direct Commit to Branch** — commit selected changes directly to any local branch without checkout (via git plumbing + temp index).

### Synced with upstream v2026.13
* All upstream features and fixes from v2026.13.

---
Upstream changelog: https://github.com/sourcegit-scm/sourcegit/releases/tag/v2026.13
